title: grastidium planum
side_effects: Grastidium planum can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, nausea, and dizziness due to its potent chemical compounds. Ingesting excessive amounts can lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting. Prolonged exposure to its toxins can cause skin irritation, itching, and allergic reactions. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can cause respiratory issues, including coughing and shortness of breath, in individuals with pre-existing conditions.
